slides.title: Deep focus may *protect* the aging brain.
slides.sub: Flow is the state where time disappears and the work feels effortless. It does more for your mind than it feels like.

slides.title: Flow quiets the inner critic
slides.body: In deep flow the brain's *default-mode network* goes quiet. That is the chatter behind self-doubt, rumination and worry.

slides.title: Focus chemistry takes over
slides.body: Absorbed attention can flood the brain with focus chemistry. The constant background noise *finally settles down*.

slides.title: Lower stress, clearer mind
slides.body: Less mental chatter is linked to *lower stress*. Flow is one of the calmest, most restorative states the brain can reach.

slides.title: A shield for cognition
slides.body: Regular deep focus may help *protect long-term cognition*. The way you spend attention now shapes the brain you keep.

slides.title: Design for one task
slides.body: Pick one task, clear the distractions, and give it a real block of time. Flow tends to *follow uninterrupted attention*.

slides.title: Build a life that *finds flow*.
slides.body: Vibe Health scores the sleep, food, movement and steps behind sharp focus, turning your daily habits into one Health Score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Flow is more than productivity. It is one of the calmest, most protective states your brain can reach. 🌿🧠

Deep focus can quiet the mental chatter, lower stress and may help shield long-term cognition. The trick is protecting your attention. Save this. 🔖
